seo.title: Tire Shop Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your tire shop. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Tire Shops
hero.subheading: New rubber feels safe, not flashy. ReviewFlo asks after mounting when the ride still feels fresh.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Tire Shop Faces

items.heading: Safety feels like obligation, not delight
items.body: Customers buy because they must, not because they want to post.

items.heading: Price shocks hit after quotes change
Waiting rooms are full of tired drivers
items.body: Nobody wants a marketing pitch before coffee.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Tire Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after the test drive check
items.body: Ask when torque is verified and payment clears.

items.heading: Private first for vibration comebacks
items.body: Balance issues get fixed before public blame.

items.heading: Retail and fleet
items.body: Managers and individuals can use the same flow.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, especially after long waits or scary tread findings.
Private feedback helps you walk through claims calmly.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Batch sends when the queue finally clears.
Reviews should reflect honesty about needs, not pressure.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Tire Shop Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
